Continue shopping

Gazelle has partnered with WarrantyLife to offer you a 1 year device protection plan.

Device Protection Coverage:
Accidents like drops, spilled liquid, and broken parts
Any issues with internal components
Issues with power
Malfunctions with the battery
100% parts and labor, with $50 deductible
Risk-free cancelation with full refund in first 30 days
Local repair options available

Most claims are processed in 1-2 business days. This plan can only be purchased at checkout. See terms and conditions.

Protect your device

Gazelle has partnered with WarrantyLife to offer you a 1 year device protection plan.

Device Protection Coverage:
Accidents like drops, spilled liquid, and broken parts
Any issues with internal components
Issues with power
Malfunctions with the battery
100% parts and labor, with $50 deductible
Risk-free cancelation with full refund in first 30 days
Local repair options available

Most claims are processed in 1-2 business days. This plan can only be purchased at checkout. See terms and conditions.
